query: UPDATE sync_logs SET status = 'error', finished_at = NOW(), error_message = 'Force-cleared: process killed (Cloud Run instance restart)' WHERE status = 'in_progress'; SELECT ROW_COUNT() as cleared;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute UPDATE sync_logs SET status = 'error', finished_at = NOW(), error_message = 'Force-cleared: process killed (Cloud Run instance restart)' WHERE status = 'in_progress'; SELECT ROW_COUNT() as cleared;
